ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type (foreign key referencing file_types table) */,
  "compression_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compression format (foreign key referencing compression_formats table) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the storage system */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension (e.g., .txt, .jpg, .zip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_compression_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("compression_format_id") REFERENCES compression_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the compression format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compression format */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Average compression ratio for this format */,
  "decompression_ratio" REAL /* Average decompression ratio for this format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression ratio */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "before_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file before compression */,
  "after_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file after compression */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio */,
  "compression_time" REAL /* Time taken for compression */,
  "decompression_time" REAL /* Time taken for decompression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_ratios_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken for compression/decompression */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "memory_used" REAL /* Memory used during compression/decompression */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during compression/decompression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role (foreign key referencing roles table) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the file */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., link, email) */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the file was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_sharing_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_sharing_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user commenting */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES file_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_ratings_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being tagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user tagging */,
  "tag_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was made */,
  "tag_text" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_tags_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., author, creation_date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_metadata_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
